name: ACM0014 v8.0 Treatment of Wastewater dMRV (Policy C)_1783892846911
description: CDM ACM0014 v8.0 (Treatment of wastewater) methane-baseline dMRV on Hedera Guardian for the DLT Earth bounty. Full 12-month TOOL14 van't Hoff-Arrhenius engine in mathBlock.
creator: did:hedera:testnet:4dTuLj1j27tDaNw374ETfzTkvraLUiWYhVXLgXZmndpb_0.0.9241937

uiMetaData.description: Mint gate: fires only if field55 (ER_y) > 0. Fail-closed on zero/negative/unparseable ER - no empty-VP mints. switchBlock+mathjs, outside the math engine.

uiMetaData.title: ACM0014 Baseline Emissions Calc
uiMetaData.description: baselineEmissionsTco2e = baselineFuelKgPerDay * periodDays * ncvFuel * efFuel * fNRB

uiMetaData.title: ACM0014 ER Summary - Gate + Discount
uiMetaData.description: netER = BEtotal-PEtotal-LEtotal; ERtotal = netER * 0.89 * wqGatePassed. NOTE: this VC is a supplementary summary/audit record. It is NOT read by mintDocumentBlock - the mint source is Monitoring Report field6.

uiMetaData.title: Parameters Monitored - Sampling and QAQC Plan
ACM0014 TOOL14 Quantification Engine
uiMetaData.description: BE_CH4 (12-month van't Hoff-Arrhenius) and ER per ACM0014 v8.0 SECURITY: input variables bind with empty schema so Guardian's DocumentMap resolves from the CURRENT document only (prevents relationship-document schema-overwrite -> stale computation -> duplicate issuance; verified vs guardian policy-service document-map.ts). KNOWN GAPS (disclosed, not silently omitted): (1) Eq.2's BE_CH4,y = MIN(Q_CH4,y*GWP, MCF-method result) is NOT implemented as a MIN - this engine computes only the MCF-method term (bey). Q_CH4,y requires Step 1 of the 'Project and leakage emissions from anaerobic digesters' tool, not yet built; omitting the MIN comparison risks over-crediting if actual digester methane production is lower than the MCF-estimated baseline. (2) Eq.4's discount factor theta (0.89 for <1yr measurement campaigns, distinct from Eq.6's MCF conservativeness 0.89) is not present in the adj/codbly chain - verify against the clean (non-OCR) v8.0 PDF before relying on CODbl,y for a real submission. (3) fd (Eq.7 depth factor) piecewise thresholds in this engine are UNVERIFIED against v8.0 - the only source text available during this audit was OCR-garbled on this specific equation; do not treat fd as confirmed correct. (4) TOOL07 (grid electricity emission-factor build/operating-margin calculation) is not implemented - EF_BL,EL,y and EF_PJ,EL,y (fields 58/60) are taken as direct monitored/reported inputs rather than derived via TOOL07's combined-margin methodology; disclosed simplification, not silently omitted. (5) TOOL09 (baseline thermal/electric generation efficiency) is not implemented - eta_BL,boiler (field64) is a bare input fraction rather than a TOOL09-derived value; same disclosed-simplification status.

items.name: beel
items.description: BE_EL,y (tCO2), Eq.13, gated by field56 (0/1, verified safe for mathBlock)

items.name: bey_total
items.description: BE_y,total (tCO2e), Eq.1 = BE_CH4 (existing 'bey') + BE_EL,y + BE_HG,y. This is the true methodology-complete baseline.

items.name: pela
items.description: PE_LA,y (tCO2e): land-application CH4+N2O, sludge & wastewater (Eq.15-20). MCF_LA=0.05; N2O mass conv 44/28. Gated by field68 (0/1).

items.name: lesm
items.description: LE_SM,y (tCO2e): solid-material leakage, Eq.23 default-D option. Gated by field74 (0/1).

items.name: peflare
items.description: PE_flaring,y (tCO2e): residual CH4 from incomplete flare combustion = F_CH4 x (1-eta_flare) x GWP_CH4 (CDM flaring tool). Gated by field81.

items.name: pey_total
items.description: PE_y,total = digester PE (field45) + land-application PE_LA + flaring PE (computed).
